lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi. Interesting building you have here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's it for?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You like it? It's simply fabulous, isn't it? A real marvel of modern design made just for my fellow alchemists and I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see some builders over there. So I assume it's not yet finished.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: What a keen eye this chap has! But imagine this: a gargantuan cylinder of expert design, incorporating an inventive inner spiral walkway to multiple planes of wondrous inhabitance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, it's a tower.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh, no, no, no, no.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: It's going to have a use that will change this world!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Or at least it would if we could ever get it finished.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: See those builders?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They don't seem to be building much.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: They've gone on strike for some petty reason about the tower being too weird. I really can't understand those men.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shame.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hey! Maybe you could talk to them?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: You look like a sturdy chap.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Maybe you could finish the work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Me?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Come on! This is the chance of a lifetime!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, why not.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: That's fantastic! Oh, I'm so pleased.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Calm down. I'm not making any promises.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Oh, I have a good feeling about this.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Go have a word with Bonafido the head builder. See if you can't get him off his backside to do some work. Oh, and I'm Effigy by the way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice to meet you Effigy, I'm [player name]. Hold on and I'll see what I can do!

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Wait a minute.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Don't I recognise you from somewhere?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, do you?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Do you know the outpost north of Ardougne?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes, it's now a small museum. Jorral's looking after it. He's really making history with that place.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Well, the King was going to make that into an alchemy lab for us, but some fool ruined our plans!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, yes. Shame. Got to go. Bye.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: Hey, wait up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Best I go sort out this tower. Bye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, feeling a bit ill today.

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: A bit ill?

lines.speaker: Effigy
lines.text: That's a weak excuse for a very feeble personality.
